tests.description: ATDD E2E tests for shared primitives, responsive token scaling, and display-safe copy (RED PHASE)
acceptance_criteria_covered: Design tokens are defined for color, type, spacing, radius, shadows, and breakpoints
Inbox, Mine, and Thread consume shared conversation primitives
Raw internal fields are suppressed from primary UI content
Responsive layouts preserve tokenized spacing/typography and touch-target constraints

summary: Generated 4 FAILING E2E tests for story g-1
